title: KnowledgeTriple
description: An atomic fact in the knowledge graph: subject-predicate-object with mandatory provenance and confidence.

subject.description: Entity the fact is about (URI or identifier)

predicate.description: Relationship type from the registered ontology

source.description: AgentPubKey of the agent who asserted this triple

created_at.description: Holochain Timestamp when the triple was created

$comment: Budget cost: assert_triple=2 RU (COST_VALIDATE_TRIPLE). Domain/range constraints enforced by coordinator ontology module.
